title: Heavy Metal Blood Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
e heavy metals leave your bloodstream quickly and are stored in your tissues. So, if you have symptoms, your provider will likely order more tests to check for heavy metals in samples of your urine, hair, skin, or fingernail clipping.
Talk with your provider to learn what your results mean.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
